---
title: "Kursmaterial"
date: today
---

## Introduktion och repetition Steg 1

<iframe src="material/introduction.html" width="100%" height="300px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Ladda ner PDF](material/introduction.pdf){target="_blank"}

## Turer och tekniker

<iframe src="material/patterns.html" width="100%" height="300px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Ladda ner PDF](material/patterns.pdf){target="_blank"}

## Feedback

<iframe src="material/feedback.html" width="100%" height="300px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Ladda ner PDF](material/feedback.pdf){target="_blank"}
